Clinical Supervision for Music Therapists

Beyond words, In Tune with your authentic self

Get Started

My Approach to Supervision

Supervision with me is collaborative, reflective, and clinically rigorous. I work from a trauma-informed, neurodiversity-affirming lens and prioritize depth over performance. This is a space to explore countertransference, clinical uncertainty, ethical nuance, and growth as a therapist — not just case review.

Supervision Options

Individual Supervision

  • 1:1 virtual sessions
  • Deep clinical case consultation
  • Countertransference & therapist process work
  • Ethical and professional identity development
  • Flexible scheduling options

Group Supervision

  • Twice monthly virtual meetings
  • Collaborative peer case reflection
  • Neurodiversity-affirming lens
  • Live attendance or recording access
  • Affordable membership model

Supervision Details

  • Individual: $75 per session
  • Group Membership: $30/month
  • Format: Virtual
  • Frequency: Flexible scheduling available

Once submitted, you’ll receive next steps and scheduling information.

Request to Begin
